name: Double Apple Corn Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 large Apple, Peeled And Finely Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a bowl.
2. In another bowl, combine eggs, applesauce, milk, and oil; stir into dry ingredients until just moistened.
3. Add chopped apple to the batter and mix well.
4. Grease a muffin pan and spoon the batter into each cavity, filling them about 2/3 full.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 425°F for 15 to 20 minutes, or until golden brown and cooked through.
